CustomField.description: Auto-maintained by the Insurance recalculation flow. One line per active-policy insurance: "Carrier - Policy# (Record Type)". Do not edit manually. (활성 보험 요약 - 자동 계산, 수동 편집 금지)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated list of active insurances; do not edit manually. (활성 보험 목록 자동 계산. 수동 편집 금지.)
CustomField.label: Active Insurance Summary
